The content provides high-level information regarding their AI platform, enterprise deployment models, and security/governance claims. No specific legal documents (e.g., full ToS, Privacy Policy, DPA) were directly accessible or linked as standalone artifacts in the provided scrape.
limitations: Only the homepage was provided; no deep-linked legal or governance documents were captured.
Security and compliance claims (SOC 2, ISO 27001, DPDP) are mentioned as marketing text on the homepage and require further verification via formal documentation.

Title: Sarvam | India's Full-Stack Sovereign AI Platform

URL Source: https://sarvam.ai/

Markdown Content:
![Image 1](https://assets.sarvam.ai/assets/pages/home/hero-gradient.svg)

![Image 2](https://assets.sarvam.ai/assets/motifs/ui/motif.svg)

India's Sovereign AI Platform

## AI for all from India

Built on sovereign compute. Powered by frontier-class models.

Delivering population-scale impact.

India builds with Sarvam

![Image 3: Partner logo 1](https://assets.sarvam.ai/assets/logos/customers/aadhaar.svg)

![Image 30: Partner logo 13](https://assets.sarvam.ai/assets/logos/customers/skill-india.svg)

![Image 31: Tata Capital](https://assets.sarvam.ai/assets/logos/customers/tata-capital.svg)

![Image 32: Partner logo 15](https://assets.sarvam.ai/assets/logos/customers/urban-company.svg)

## The AI Platform India Builds On

## Build anything with Sarvam APIs

Everything you need to add Indic AI to your product.

## India Can

From government services reaching 800 million citizens to enterprises transforming customer experience, AI that speaks India's languages is changing what's possible.

## Powering India's AI-first future

For Enterprise | Government | Developers

### Population-scale Applications

Building products India can use. Conversational agents fluent in India's languages. Platforms that run enterprise workflows from start to finish.

### State-of-the-Art Models

State-of-the-art models trained on sovereign data, delivering strong performance across Indian languages.

### Infrastructure to Serve Models Efficiently

A token factory built to handle complexity of model serving so teams can focus on building products, not managing infrastructure.

## Trusted by India's Largest Enterprises

Real results from real customers across BFSI, government, and enterprise.

## Enterprise-grade. Out of the box.

Compliance, control, and confidence. Not bolted on. Built in from day one.

### Forward deployed

Our engineers work alongside yours, designing agents, integrating systems, and staying until you're live. Not a handoff. A partnership.

*   Dedicated engineer from day one
*   Joint workflow design and build
*   Ongoing accuracy and cost optimisation
*   SLA-backed production support

### Deployment flexibility

Arya deploys where your data already lives. Private cloud, on-premise, hybrid, or fully air-gapped environments. Your agents run on your terms.

*   Private cloud, on-premise, or hybrid
*   Bring your own model or use ours
*   Swap vendors without rewriting workflows
*   Air-gapped deployment available

### Security and governance

Every agent action is logged and traceable. Role-based access, audit trails, and data residency controls built into the core, not retrofitted. Arya meets you where your risk team is.

SOC 2 Type II ISO 27001 DPDP compliant Role-based access Full audit trail Data residency controls

[](https://sarvam.ai/contact-us)

## Built to run

anywhere your business runs

## What our customers say

## Research & Updates

[](https://sarvam.ai/blogs)

legal_stack_review.document_stack_synthesis: The admitted public footprint for Sarvam AI is limited to the company homepage. While the homepage makes significant marketing claims regarding enterprise-grade compliance (SOC 2, ISO 27001, DPDP) and data residency controls, none of the five core legal/governance documents (ToS, Privacy Policy, DPA, AUP, SLA) are visible in the admitted evidence. A founder or enterprise customer reading the homepage might assume these governance surfaces exist and are aligned with the product's deployment model, but there is no public-footprint evidence to verify this. This absence requires qualified legal review to determine the actual governance architecture.

legal_stack_assessment.false_belief_note: A founder might assume standard terms exist for an enterprise AI platform, but none are publicly accessible.
A founder might assume a privacy notice exists given the claims of DPDP compliance, but none is visible.
A founder might assume enterprise data processing terms are in place for a platform that handles private/on-premise data, but no DPA is visible.
A founder might assume usage restrictions exist for an AI platform, but none are visible.
A founder might assume uptime or support commitments exist for an enterprise-grade platform, but none are visible.

limitations: No formal legal or governance documents (ToS, Privacy Policy, DPA, AUP, SLA) were visible in the admitted source bundle.
The source bundle is limited to the homepage content.

Legal entity and HQ jurisdiction are not visible in the admitted evidence.
